title: Entity Pin Cushion Revived
description: Lets arrows stick into most mobs, not just players.
body:
[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2adb416f75e625294df6e52a37ce5c0569870941_0.webp)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/PB1vN)

**NOTE: This is a port of [Entity Pin Cushions](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-pin-cushions), all credits go to [Traben](https://modrinth.com/user/Traben)**

Lets arrows (and bee stingers) stick into most mobs, not just players.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c94a0ac8e69905ead32ae0e96618f9d3eadf58d.png)
